seo.title: Home
seo.description: Taiwan BronyCon is a fan event combining creation, market, and exchange, featuring vendors, venue maps, schedules, and complete event information. We invite everyone who loves ponies and creative culture to participate.

home.subtitle: August 15, 2026

about.title: About Us
about.content: Taiwan BronyCon (TWBC) is an unofficial gathering for fans who love My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic. We combine international convention experience with local brony culture to create a special event for Taiwanese bronies. Whether it's through socialize, creation, or games, every participant can experience the spirit of "Friendship is Magic" and build deep connections with fellow Bronies.

location.title: Location
location.name: Asi Space
location.address: 10F, No. 111, Sec. 4, Sanhe Rd., Sanchong Dist., New Taipei City
location.mapTitle: Google Map showing TW BronyCon venue location

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: TWBC is a convention for My Little Pony fans!
faq.q2: How many tickets are available in total?
faq.a3: Yes. However, the event is primarily intended for attendees aged 16 and above. Children under 16 may find it harder to fit in. Children under 13 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian throughout the event.
faq.q4: Will the participant's name be printed on the badge?
faq.a4: There is a blank space on the badge for you to write your own name or nickname.

descriptions.royale: Premium choice, thank you for your support!

newsPage.title: News
newsPage.heading: Village Mailbox
newsPage.description: Announcements and updates from Kirin Village will be delivered here.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Schedule of events, panels, and performances at Taiwan BronyCon.
schedule.hint: Tap an event block to view details.
schedule.note: The schedule below is for reference only and may be subject to change.

venue.title: Venue Map
venue.hint: Tap a zone or booth on the map to view detailed schedule, description, and links.

zones.stage: The heart of the convention. Opening ceremony, panel discussions, mini-games, DJ performance, group sing-along, and group photos will be hosted here.
zones.vendors: A marketplace of vendor booths selling pony-themed merchandise, fan art, handicrafts, and fanzines meticulously designed by community creators.
zones.workshop: Interactive Creative Space. Paper and colored markers are provided. Welcome to draw and exchange creative ideas with like-minded friends here.
zones.social: At the large table and seating area, you can chat or play various board games and interactive games with other participants. Feel free to pull up a chair anytime to join in and meet new friends!
zones.exhibition: A spacious gallery displaying artworks, models, and community showcases.
zones.bar: Bar & Lounge. Offers drinks and a cozy seating area for attendees to relax and socialize.
zones.checkin: The main check-in counter for registration, ticket scanning, and badge collections.
zones.entrance: The main entry queue area for ticket validation and badge collection. Please follow staff directions during peak hours.

transport.title: Transport Guide
transport.mrtDesc: Take the MRT Orange Line (Luzhou Line) to Sanhe Junior High School Station (O51). Walk from Exit 2 (the venue is directly adjacent to the station building).
transport.busDesc: Get off at MRT Sanhe Junior High School Station. Available routes: 225, 232, 306, 508, 704, 857, 925, etc.
transport.drivingDesc: Take Highway 1 to Sanchong Interchange, go toward Sanchong/Luzhou, and turn onto Sanhe Rd.

notFound.title: Booth Not Found
notFound.message: Sorry, we couldn't find the details for this booth.

list.title: Vendors
list.subtitle: Discover fan art and merchandises from fandom creators.

booth.disclaimer: Disclaimer: Booth vendors are independent participants. Their products, opinions, and conduct do not represent the TWBC team or staff. TWBC is not responsible for any transaction disputes or vendor merchandise.

rainboom.title: Sonic Rainboom
rainboom.subtitle: TWBC Late-Night Music Party
rainboom.intro: As a Brony, are the catchy tunes of My Little Pony constantly stuck in your head? Do you find yourself on an endless loop listening to MLP music? The late-night music party will feature 3 DJs taking turns on stage to hype up the crowd. Have you reviewed your favorite MLP songs yet?
rainboom.djVibeDesc: Featuring 3 community DJs spinning custom MLP remixes and electronic tracks. Relive your favorite musical moments with high-energy beats!
rainboom.lightShowDesc: Dynamic lighting and background visuals synced perfectly to the rhythm of pony music.
rainboom.singAlongDesc: Dance and sing along with fellow Bronies. Feel the magic of friendship in every beat!
rainboom.noticeContent:
• Light sticks, glow gear, and glowing cosplay are highly welcome!
• Stay hydrated and take breaks when needed.
• Respect others and follow staff instructions to ensure a safe and fun environment for all.
